name: Content Creation Pipeline
description: Research a topic, draft content, review for quality, and produce a final document.
steps: Research the given topic thoroughly. Search for relevant information, recent developments, and key data points.
Draft the content based on the research. Create a well-structured document with an introduction, main sections, and conclusion.
Review the draft for quality. Check for accuracy, clarity, grammar, and completeness. Suggest improvements.
Produce the final version incorporating review feedback. Ensure the content is polished and ready for publication.
